content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of NNN integers, and a positive parameter XXX.

You may perform the following action as many times as you want (possibly 000):


Choose iii (1‚â§i‚â§N)(1 \le i \le N)(1‚â§i‚â§N) and modify AiA_iAi‚Äã to Ai+XA_i + XAi‚Äã+X.
Find the minimum possible value of A1‚äïA2‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïANA_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus A_NA1‚Äã‚äïA2‚Äã‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïAN‚Äã at the end of the actions, where ‚äï\oplus‚äï denotes the Bitwise XOR operator.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains NNN and XXX - the size of the array, and the parameter.
The second line contains NNN integers - A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the minimum value of  A1‚äïA2‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïANA_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus A_NA1‚Äã‚äïA2‚Äã‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïAN‚Äã after performing some actions.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 2‚ãÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚ãÖ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1 : Add X=2X = 2X=2 to A1A_1A1‚Äã 505050 times. This changes the array AAA to [101,100][101, 100][101,100], and 101‚äï100=1101 \oplus 100 = 1101‚äï100=1.
Test Case 2 : A1‚äïA2‚äïA3=1‚äï2‚äï3=0A_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus A_3 = 1 \oplus 2 \oplus 3 = 0A1‚Äã‚äïA2‚Äã‚äïA3‚Äã=1‚äï2‚äï3=0 already before any actions.
